verses.1: “Listen to me, you who follow after righteousness,
verses.3: For the LORD has comforted Zion.
verses.6: Lift up your eyes to the heavens,
verses.7: “Listen to me, you who know righteousness,
verses.8: For the moth will eat them up like a garment,
verses.9: Awake, awake, put on strength, arm of the LORD!
verses.10: Isn’t it you who dried up the sea,
verses.11: Those ransomed by the LORD will return,
verses.12: “I, even I, am he who comforts you.
verses.13: Have you forgotten the LORD your Maker,
verses.14: The captive exile will speedily be freed.
verses.15: For I am the LORD your God, who stirs up the sea
verses.16: I have put my words in your mouth
verses.18: There is no one to guide her among all the sons to whom she has given birth;
verses.19: These two things have happened to you—
verses.21: Therefore now hear this, you afflicted,
verses.23: I will put it into the hand of those who afflict you,
